Title: Minimalist City Skyline Throw Pillow Art Print
Description:
Bring a touch of urban artistry to any room with this stylish and modern city skyline throw pillow. Featuring a minimalist line art drawing in striking black and yellow hues, this pillow instantly elevates your decor.

The design captures the iconic silhouette of a bustling metropolitan area—perfect for lovers of architecture and modern aesthetics. The clean lines and bold color combination provide a graphic pop of color without overwhelming your space.

  • Modern Decor Accent: Ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, or home offices seeking a contemporary touch.
  • Unique Gift Idea: Makes a thoughtful and stylish gift for housewarmings, urban dwellers, or art enthusiasts.
  • Durable & Vibrant: Printed on high-quality fabric designed to maintain its color and integrity while adding sophisticated flair.

Whether you're aiming for a Scandinavian, industrial, or contemporary look, this pillow is a versatile piece of wall-worthy art that doubles as a functional accent cushion. Effortlessly blend city charm with cozy comfort.
